app_tagline: Sing together, make memories, have fun.
search_placeholder_youtube: Search song or paste a Spotify or YouTube link
search_placeholder_bilibili: Search song or paste a Bilibili link
queue_empty_desc: Be the one who gets the fun started!
leave_session_desc: Your queued songs will remain, but you will need to re-scan the QR code to rejoin.
scan_code_desc: Scan code or use link to add songs to the queue
scan_qr_prompt: Scan QR to get the party started!
queue_empty_host_desc: Scan the QR code to search and add some tracks!
end_session_desc: This will immediately disconnect all Acts and destroy the room. This action cannot be undone.
